rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Fred Mackota's Motion For Protective Order Terminating Or Limiting Deposition is granted as it seeks an order terminating the deposition. The court finds that there is no good cause to order the continuation of Petitioner's deposition. Respondent has had adequate opportunity to depose Petitioner and has not shown the need for additional testimony or demonstrated what relevant testimony he was unable to obtain. = (612/HEWLETT)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Compel Fred Mackota'S Deposition, For Monetary Sancitons, And Appointment Of Discovery Referee
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Richard Mackota's Motion To Compel Fred Mackota's Deposition, For Monetary Sanctions, and For Appointment of Discovery Referee is denied. = (612/HEWLETT)
